◎简　　介  

　　A documentary about the former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher: As It Was,will be marketing its market debut, with Altitude looking after international sales. Altitude will also co-distribute in the U.K. with Lorton Entertainment. The new comes just two years after the release of the doc Oasis:Supersonic, which Lorton also helped distribute.(https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/ne...
